user.label: Navigation related to your user account

footer.disclaimer: MBO is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the {fcp}. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. © Wizards of the Coast LLC.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.claim: Keep your collection of magic cards organized.
welcome.intro: While building a new deck, you want to add a specific card. You know that you own the card - somewhere in your 10+ binders/boxes/whatever. After searching for half an hour, you give up and buy a new copy. Sounds familiar? MBO is for you.

oracle.title: Oracle Cards
oracle.explanation: One card for each Oracle ID. The chosen sets for the cards are an attempt to return the most up-to-date recognizable version of the card.

default.title: Default Cards
default.explanation: Every card in English or the printed language if the card is only available in one language.

sets.title: Sets
sets.explanation: Every set, including many un-official sets as a way to group promotional or outlier cards together.

artists.title: Artists
artists.explanation: Every artist that has created artwork for a MtG card.

artCrops.title: Art Crops
artCrops.explanation: Card images, cropped so it shows only the art itself.

cardImages.title: Card Images
cardImages.explanation: Scanned images of the full card.

scryfall.title: Scryfall
scryfall.explanation: Scryfall is the backbone of all MtG community websites.

cards.title: Total cards
cards.explanation: The number of cards in collections.

containers.title: Containers
containers.explanation: The number of containers organized in MBO.

worth.title: Total worth
worth.explanation: The total worth of cards organized in MBO collections.

register.title: Registration
register.intro: After registering, we will send you a link to verify your e-mail address. You can login after verifying your e-mail address.

login.title: Login
login.nav_label: If you can't login, use these links.

forgot.title: Can't login?
forgot.intro: If you can't access your user account, we can send you either your user name or a link that resets your password. Simply select either password or user name, and provide your e-mail address. If you have forgotten the password, you will also need to enter your username.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.intro: Enter your new password. After saving you can login using your new password.

resend_verification.title: Resend verification link
resend_verification.intro: If your verification link has expired, you can request a new link to verify your e-mail-address. Please supply the e-mail address and the username.

password.headline: Change Password
password.intro: You can change your password by entering the current password and the new password.

profile.headline: Update Profile
profile.intro: You can change your E-Mail address and/or your username. If you update either, you will be logged out and need to login with the new data. If you update the E-Mail address, you will need to verify it by clicking on the link that we send you.

two_factor.headline: Two-Factor authentication
two_factor.intro: Two-factor authentication uses a {totp}. You will need an appropriate app, like Google/Microsoft Authenticator or {tool1} / {tool2}.
two_factor.requires_confirmation: To activate, you need to provide your password.

setup.title: Setup Two-Factor Authentication
setup.explanation: finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code in your authenticator app, or enter the code manually.

verification.title: Confirm 2FA
verification.explanation: Enter the one-time password from your app and click on 'Confirm'.

recovery_codes.headline: Recovery Codes
recovery_codes.explanation: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery_codes.label: Recovery codes

regenerate_codes.explanation: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, use the button 'Regenerate Codes'

disable_section.headline: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable_section.explanation: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.

deletion.title: Delete user account
deletion.explanation: If needed, you can delete your user account. {caution} - this action deletes everything associated with your user account, including your collection and decks.
deletion.no_soft_deletes: We do not use {soft_deletes}, the account is deleted forever.
deletion.reversed: This action can not be reversed, we can't restore a deleted user account.

modal.title: Confirm deletion
modal.explanation: Are you sure you want to delete your user account permanently?

totalCards.title: Total Cards
totalCards.explanation: The total number of cards in your collection.

totalStacks.title: Unique Stacks
totalStacks.explanation: The number of distinct card stacks in your collection.

totalPrice.title: Total Value
totalPrice.explanation: The estimated total value of your collection based on current market prices.

containers.title: Containers
containers.explanation: The number of containers you use to organize your collection.

commons.title: Commons
commons.explanation: The number of common cards in your collection.

uncommons.title: Uncommons
uncommons.explanation: The number of uncommon cards in your collection.

rares.title: Rares
rares.explanation: The number of rare cards in your collection.

mythics.title: Mythics
mythics.explanation: The number of mythic rare cards in your collection.

containers.title: My Containers
containers.explanation: Containers are the backbone of your collection - digitally organize your cards like you do with the paper cards in real life.
containers.none: You have not created any containers yet. Start organizing your collection by creating one!
containers.sort_error: The sort order could not be saved. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Container {name}?
delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete this container? This action can not be undone.
delete.warning: This container has {amount} cards worth a total of {worth}.

prune.title: Delete all cards from the container '{name}'?
prune.warning: This container has {amount} cards worth a total of {worth}.
prune.question: Are you sure you want to delete all cards from this container? This action can not be undone.

container_page.empty: This container has no cards yet.

delete.title: Delete card stack?
delete.question: Are you sure you want to remove {description} from {container}? This action can not be undone.

move.title: Move cards?
move.question: You have selected {amount} card stacks from {container} - where do you want to move them?

delete_selected.title: Delete selected card stacks?
delete_selected.question: Are you sure you want to delete {amount} card stacks from {container}? This action can not be undone.

container_qr.title: Create QR code for {name}
container_qr.explanation: Generate a QR Code for {name}. The QR code points to the detail page of the container - print the QR code on a sticker and place it on a container.

mbo.line1: When importing from our own import format, we will match the container according to the container id column - the 'Import to' dropdown is ignored.
mbo.line2: If you want to import all cards to a specific container - regardless of origin - empty the 'container id' column in the CSV file.

archidekt.line1: Archidekt allows you to choose the columns that you want to have exported.
archidekt.line2: Please use these columns to ensure we can map the import correctly: Quantity, Card Name, Foil, Condition, Language, Edition Code, Collector Number, Scryfall ID.

defaults.title: Defaults
defaults.explanation: You can use the current settings as defaults so they will be used when you return to this page. Clearing the current defaults will return to app-wide defaults.

legend.required: Fields marked with a {icon} are required.
legend.password: When entering your password, we check if the password is secure enough. Insecure passwords are rejected.
legend.2fa: Your account has enabled two-factor authentication. Please check your app for a one-time password, or use a recovery code to login.

search.showing: Show {visible} results of {total} total. Scroll for more.

tips.general: You can use spaces to separate your query - {query} finds (among others) {result}.
tips.set: You can also use {set_codes} to restrict your search the specific sets. {set_example} restricts to cards from {set_result}.
tips.cn: You can use {cn_codes} to find specific collector numbers - {cn_example} finds {cn_result}.
tips.combined: You can also combine different methods - {combined_example} finds {combined_result}.
tips.combined_result: Dawnhand Eulogist - collector number 99 in Lorwyn Eclipsed
